metadata.method_name: Iterated path-consistency closure (FULL) under a realism-matched simulated reader channel
metadata.description: Re-establish H3/H4/silent-wrong on consistent-by-construction QCNs read by a channel CALIBRATED to the iter-1 real-text frontier pilot. PRIMARY algebra = convex point algebra (PC-complete, exact).

rho_fit.calibration: channel ICC set to directly-measured rho_within_doc
rho_fit.note: rho realism term = max |J2_sim(rho_measured) - J2_real| (does the channel at the measured ICC reproduce real pairwise joint soundness?). J3 residual is larger on knobs flagged J2J3_internally_inconsis...

topology.E_measure: minimal-deduction-path edge count (contributing-edge-count); cyclo = independent alternative shortest routes (redundancy)
topology.evaluated_stratum_note: the iter-1 frontier pilot EVALUATED deduction TRIANGLES (E_min=2); the synthetic family R matches that stratum directly. The longer-hop tail (E_min>6) exists in the gold graph but is outside the synth...

realism.projection_note: POINT arm: real ALLEN error-types projected onto the native point ladder {singleton,pair,universal,unsound} (loose+universal->universal) for apples-to-apples TV; the ALLEN arm matches the full 5 categ...

H3.page_p_note: Per-slice Page's-L p computed correctly (20 blocks x |HOP| conditions); order ~1e-4..1e-8 depending on slice and N. The paper's earlier '1e-13' was a mis-statement; values clamped to a 1e-12 floor are...

silent_wrong_vs_recall.rigorous_bound: per_network 1-J(E) (zero-FP theorem: WRONG implies >=1 unsound edge)
silent_wrong_vs_recall.note: Pooled silent-wrong may exceed the per-edge (1-recall) reference for large E (many contributing edges) -- the operative RIGOROUS bound is per-network 1-J(E); at the E=2 single-path stratum (1-recall) ...

zero_FP_theorem.statement: All-sound contributing edges => gold in Mode-A output with probability exactly 1.0; a path-inconsistency collapse never co-occurs with all-sound reads. This is the soundness invariant of path consiste...

C3_reliability.attribution: independence-approximation failure (offset shrinks under J(E), not a soundness failure)
C3_reliability.interpretation: contains-gold scales with empirical J(E); slope<1 reflects point-algebra absorption (LT.EQ=LT) retaining gold MORE robustly than J(E) predicts -> the certificate over-delivers.

allen.note: Direct same-algebra calibration to TBDense_dense (ALLEN); per-edge error-type TV computed in the FULL 5-category space (the 'loose' category IS representable here). PC is sound-but-incomplete for full...

overall_verdict.notes: Calibrated single-knob channel reproduces the real recall ladder (dead-knob bug fixed) and drives per-edge error-type TV ~0 in the apples-to-apples space (point projected) and full 5-cat space (Allen)...
